claims.text: Foundation models based on prior-data fitted networks (PFNs) have shown strong empirical performance in causal inference by framing the task as an in-context learning problem.
claims.source_quote: Foundation models based on prior-data fitted networks (PFNs) have shown strong empirical performance in causal inference by framing the task as an in-context learning problem.

claims.text: Existing PFNs, when interpreted as Bayesian ATE estimators, can exhibit prior-induced confounding bias.
claims.source_quote: We show that existing PFNs, when interpreted as Bayesian ATE estimators, can exhibit prior-induced confounding bias

claims.text: In PFNs with prior-induced confounding bias, the prior is not asymptotically overwritten by data.
claims.source_quote: the prior is not asymptotically overwritten by data

claims.text: Prior not being asymptotically overwritten by data prevents frequentist consistency in PFNs.
claims.source_quote: the prior is not asymptotically overwritten by data, which, in turn, prevents frequentist consistency

claims.text: The one-step posterior correction (OSPC) calibration procedure helps to restore frequentist consistency in PFNs.
claims.source_quote: We show that the OSPC helps to restore frequentist consistency

claims.text: OSPC can yield a semi-parametric Bernstein-von Mises theorem for calibrated PFNs.
claims.source_quote: can yield a semi-parametric Bernstein-von Mises theorem for calibrated PFNs

claims.text: Both calibrated PFN-based estimators and classical semi-parametric efficient estimators converge in distribution with growing data size.
claims.source_quote: both the calibrated PFN-based estimators and the classical semi-parametric efficient estimators converge in distribution with growing data size

claims.text: OSPC can be implemented through tailoring martingale posteriors on top of PFNs.
claims.source_quote: we implement OSPC through tailoring martingale posteriors on top of the PFNs

claims.text: Functional nuisance posteriors can be recovered from PFNs using the martingale posterior approach.
claims.source_quote: we are able to recover functional nuisance posteriors from PFNs, required by the OSPC

claims.text: PFNs calibrated with martingale posterior OSPC produce ATE uncertainty that asymptotically matches frequentist uncertainty.
claims.source_quote: PFNs calibrated with our martingale posterior OSPC produce ATE uncertainty that (i) asymptotically matches frequentist uncertainty

claims.text: PFNs calibrated with martingale posterior OSPC are well calibrated in finite samples in comparison to other Bayesian ATE estimators.
claims.source_quote: PFNs calibrated with our martingale posterior OSPC produce ATE uncertainty that... (ii) is well calibrated in finite samples in comparison to other Bayesian ATE estimators
